# 📁 Site Modules

✅ Folder included in Backups  
✅ Modified files in this folder will not be overwritten by updates/upgrades.  
⚠️ Developers may manually edit folder content or deploy modules manually.  

This folder stores deployed site modules that are currently active. The __disabled folder stores inactive modules. Modules placed there are recognized as inactive and handled accordingly based on their type.

🐟 Bugfish
